news-korea-econ.title: Indian Prime Minister Demands Pandemic-Era 'Work from Home' over Strait of Hormuz Fuel Crisis
news-korea-econ.description:
Indian Prime Minister Narendra Modi wants coronavirus-era work from home practices to save fuel during the Strait of Hormuz oil crisis.
The post Indian Prime Minister Demands Pandemic-Era ‘Work from Home’ over Strait of Hormuz Fuel Crisis appeared first on Br…

news-global-econ.title: Cola wars in India fuel booming demand for visi-coolers and retail fridges
news-global-econ.description: Beverage companies are aggressively expanding distribution by installing fridges in mom-and-pop shops across the country, turning cold storage units into key marketing and sales tools.

news-global-econ.title: Franklin Templeton bets on fixed income growth to rebuild India business
news-global-econ.description: Franklin Templeton is shifting focus to fixed income in India, aiming to reduce equity exposure and expand debt funds amid rising investor interest and competition.

news-global-econ.title: Exclusive – Sec. Burgum on Economy-Crushing Bureaucratic Creep: '80% of What People Were Being Held Accountable for' Not Original Law
news-global-econ.description: Interior Secretary Doug Burgum argued while speaking at a Breitbart News policy event that the vast majority of the legal hoops the American energy industry has to jump through are setting the U.S. back, while China skips over bureaucracy in the race for AI d…

news-global-econ.title: Ted Cruz labels AOC's billionaire comments on American Revolution as 'bizarrely foolish'
news-global-econ.description: Sen. Ted Cruz called AOC a "little Marxist" and blasted her claims that billionaires didn't earn their wealth, saying her ideology leads to communism.

news-global-econ.title: Members of Congress using online prediction markets? Don't bet on it
news-global-econ.description: The Senate voted unanimously to ban prediction markets for senators and aides, while a broader congressional stock trading ban remains seemingly out of reach.

news-global-soc.title: 'She's Looking Towards a Global Communist Revolution': GOP Rep. Gill Urges AOC to Seek Presidency
news-global-soc.description:
During an appearance on FNC's "The Ingraham Angle," Rep. Brandon Gill (R-TX) reacted to the suggestion that his colleague Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez was seeking the White House in 2028.

news-global-soc.title: Trump administration rejects UN migration declaration, says 'mass migration was never safe'
news-global-soc.description: The State Department said it objects to U.N. efforts to "advocate and facilitate replacement immigration in the United States and across the broader West."

news-global-soc.title: Man with Gun Allegedly Shoots at Cars in Stringently Gun-Controlled Massachusetts
news-global-soc.description:
A man with a long gun allegedly shot at numerous cars on Memorial Drive in Cambridge, Massachusetts, around 1:30 p.m. Monday.
The post Man with Gun Allegedly Shoots at Cars in Stringently Gun-Controlled Massachusetts appeared first on Breitbart.
